task_completion.description: Create a central table (Spreadsheet) with the required named parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a FreeCAD Spreadsheet open with at least four parameters defined: fin count, fin height, fin thickness, and base plate thickness.

task_completion.description: Design the TO-220 mounting surface and hole.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketch or 3D feature in FreeCAD showing a mounting surface area (task specifies 15.9mm x 10.15mm) and a single hole (3.5mm diameter) for the TO-220 package.

task_completion.description: Create the fin-and-base extrusion with at least 8 fins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model in FreeCAD clearly displaying a base plate with an array of at least 8 distinct fins extruded from it.

task_completion.description: Create at least 2 M3 clearance mounting holes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model showing at least 2 additional holes (separate from the TO-220 hole) intended for mounting the heatsink, typically located on the base plate.

task_completion.description: Save the FreeCAD model to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal output, or FreeCAD title bar showing 'heatsink.FCStd' saved in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

task_completion.description: Export the model to STL and STEP formats.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal output showing 'heatsink.stl' and 'heatsink.step' present in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually used FreeCAD to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the FreeCAD graphical interface open with the model being actively built (e.g., sketches, extrusions, or tree view visible), rather than just running a script blindly.

integrity.description: The exported files are genuine 3D model files, not empty text files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for export dialogs in FreeCAD or terminal `ls -l` outputs showing that the .stl and .step files have a file size greater than 0 bytes, proving they weren't created using the `touch` command.

integrity.description: The agent built the model from scratch rather than copying an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view (Combo View) should show a history of operations like 'Sketch', 'Pad', 'LinearPattern', or 'Spreadsheet', indicating step-by-step creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The design requires a minimum of 8 fins, 4 specific spreadsheet parameters (fin_count, fin_height, fin_thickness, base_thickness), and 2 mounting holes. Note that while the task specifies TO-220 dimensions of 15.9mm x 10.15mm with a 3.5mm hole, standard TO-220 dimensions are slightly different (15.7mm x 9.9mm); the agent should ideally use the task-specified dimensions, but minor deviations matching real-world JEDEC specs are acceptable.
